attributes.description: Node listing with controls-based filtering for cluster and node selection.

embeddableConfig.description: Navigation links to other K8s dashboards.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, CASE(k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    memory_pressure = LAST(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure, CASE(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    pod_seen = MAX(CASE(k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    mem_avail = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL live_pod_uid = CASE(
    k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND pod_seen IS NOT NULL AND DATE_DIFF("minute", pod_seen, latest_ts) <= 5, k8s.pod.uid,
    NULL)
| STATS
    ready = MAX(ready),
    memory_pressure = MAX(memory_pressure),
    pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(live_pod_uid),
    cpu_usage = AVG(cpu_usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(alloc_cpu),
    mem_ws = AVG(mem_ws),
    alloc_mem = AVG(alloc_mem),
    mem_avail = AVG(mem_avail),
    fs_usage = AVG(fs_usage),
    fs_cap = AVG(fs_cap)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    status = CASE(ready == 1, "Ready", ready == 0, "Not ready", "Unknown"),
    mem_pressure = CASE(memory_pressure == 1, "Memory pressure", memory_pressure == 0, "No memory pressure", "Unknown"),
    cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4), NULL),
    mem_ws_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4), NULL),
    disk_util = CASE(fs_cap > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4), NULL)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, status, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_ws_util, mem_avail, disk_util
| SORT status ASC

FROM metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS
    ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, CASE(k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    memory_pressure = LAST(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure, CASE(k8s.node.condition_memory_pressure IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    pod_seen = MAX(CASE(k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL, @timestamp, NULL)),
    cpu_usage = AVG(k8s.node.cpu.usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu),
    mem_ws = AVG(k8s.node.memory.working_set),
    alloc_mem = AVG(k8s.node.allocatable_memory),
    mem_avail = AVG(k8s.node.memory.available),
    fs_usage = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.usage),
    fs_cap = AVG(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, k8s.pod.uid
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| EVAL live_pod_uid = CASE(
    k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL AND pod_seen IS NOT NULL AND DATE_DIFF("minute", pod_seen, latest_ts) <= 5, k8s.pod.uid,
    NULL)
| STATS
    ready = MAX(ready),
    memory_pressure = MAX(memory_pressure),
    pods = COUNT_DISTINCT(live_pod_uid),
    cpu_usage = AVG(cpu_usage),
    alloc_cpu = AVG(alloc_cpu),
    mem_ws = AVG(mem_ws),
    alloc_mem = AVG(alloc_mem),
    mem_avail = AVG(mem_avail),
    fs_usage = AVG(fs_usage),
    fs_cap = AVG(fs_cap)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| EVAL
    status = CASE(ready == 1, "Ready", ready == 0, "Not ready", "Unknown"),
    mem_pressure = CASE(memory_pressure == 1, "Memory pressure", memory_pressure == 0, "No memory pressure", "Unknown"),
    cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, ROUND(cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, 4), NULL),
    mem_ws_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), 4), NULL),
    disk_util = CASE(fs_cap > 0, ROUND(TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), 4), NULL)
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, status, mem_pressure, pods, cpu_util, mem_ws_util, mem_avail, disk_util
| SORT status ASC

embeddableConfig.description: Summary per node. Click a node name to drill into node details, or a cluster to drill into cluster details. Status and memory pressure reflect the latest collected values. Pod count, memory available and disk utilization are latest values. Avg CPU and avg memory working set utilization are averaged over the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT(*)

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS total_nodes = COUNT(*)

embeddableConfig.description: Total number of nodes across all clusters, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready > 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS healthy_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready > 0

embeddableConfig.description: Number of ready nodes across all clusters, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range. Investigate unexpected drops.

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready <= 0

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.condition_ready IS NOT NULL
| STATS ready = LAST(k8s.node.condition_ready, @timestamp),
    last_seen = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| INLINE STATS latest_ts = MAX(last_seen) BY k8s.cluster.name
| WHERE DATE_DIFF("minute", last_seen, latest_ts) <= 5
| STATS unhealthy_nodes = COUNT(*) WHERE ready <= 0

embeddableConfig.description: Number of not-ready nodes across all clusters, based on the latest collected data for the selected time range. Any non-zero value should be investigated.

query.esql:
TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS
    `Total nodes (range)` = COUNT(*),
    `Nodes ready (in bucket)` = COUNT(*) WHERE ready == 1,
    `Nodes not ready (in bucket)` = COUNT(*) WHERE ready == 0,
    `Nodes unknown (in bucket)` = COUNT(*) WHERE ready IS NULL
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Total nodes (range)`, `Nodes ready (in bucket)`, `Nodes not ready (in bucket)`, `Nodes unknown (in bucket)`

TS metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
| STATS ready = MAX(k8s.node.condition_ready)
  BY timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend), k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name
| STATS
    `Total nodes (range)` = COUNT(*),
    `Nodes ready (in bucket)` = COUNT(*) WHERE ready == 1,
    `Nodes not ready (in bucket)` = COUNT(*) WHERE ready == 0,
    `Nodes unknown (in bucket)` = COUNT(*) WHERE ready IS NULL
  BY timestamp
| SORT timestamp
| KEEP timestamp, `Total nodes (range)`, `Nodes ready (in bucket)`, `Nodes not ready (in bucket)`, `Nodes unknown (in bucket)`

embeddableConfig.description: Shows total, ready, not-ready, and unknown node counts over time for the selected time range. Non-ready or unknown nodes should be investigated.
embeddableConfig.title: Node count over time

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, k8s.pod.uid,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT(*),
    running_pods = COUNT(*) WHERE phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, @timestamp
| EVAL unhealthy_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| SORT @timestamp ASC, unhealthy_pods DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp, unhealthy_pods

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.pod.phase IS NOT NULL
| STATS phase = MAX(k8s.pod.phase)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, k8s.pod.uid,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS
    total_pods = COUNT(*),
    running_pods = COUNT(*) WHERE phase == 2
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, @timestamp
| EVAL unhealthy_pods = total_pods - running_pods
| SORT @timestamp ASC, unhealthy_pods DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp, unhealthy_pods

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top nodes by non-running pod count over time. Watch for sustained non-zero values or sudden spikes.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by non-running pods

query.esql:
FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS present = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, k8s.pod.uid,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS pods = COUNT(*)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp ASC, pods DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp, pods

FROM metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.pod.uid IS NOT NULL
| STATS present = MAX(@timestamp)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, k8s.pod.uid,
    @timestamp = BUCKET(@timestamp, 50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| STATS pods = COUNT(*)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, @timestamp
| SORT @timestamp ASC, pods DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY @timestamp
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, @timestamp, pods

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top nodes by pod count over time. Use this to spot uneven pod distribution.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by pod density

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
| STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| WHERE cpu_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp ASC, cpu_util DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, cpu_util

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.cpu.usage IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_cpu IS NOT NULL)
| STATS cpu_usage = MAX(k8s.node.cpu.usage), alloc_cpu = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_cpu)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL cpu_util = CASE(alloc_cpu > 0, cpu_usage / alloc_cpu, NULL)
| WHERE cpu_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp ASC, cpu_util DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp
| KEEP k8s.node.name, k8s.cluster.name, timestamp, cpu_util

embeddableConfig.description: Shows the top nodes by CPU utilization over time. Values near 100% can indicate CPU saturation.
embeddableConfig.title: Top 10 nodes by CPU utilization

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*, metrics-k8sclusterreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL

| EVAL mem_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| WHERE mem_util IS NOT NULL

  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND (k8s.node.memory.working_set IS NOT NULL OR k8s.node.allocatable_memory IS NOT NULL)
| STATS mem_ws = MAX(k8s.node.memory.working_set), alloc_mem = MAX(k8s.node.allocatable_memory)
  BY k8s.cluster.name, k8s.node.name, timestamp = TBUCKET(50, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| EVAL mem_util = CASE(alloc_mem > 0, TO_DOUBLE(mem_ws) / TO_DOUBLE(alloc_mem), NULL)
| WHERE mem_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp ASC, mem_util DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC

query.esql:
TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE k8s.cluster.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.cluster.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.name IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.name != ""
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.usage IS NOT NULL
  AND k8s.node.filesystem.capacity IS NOT NULL
| STATS fs_usage = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.usage), fs_cap = MAX(k8s.node.filesystem.capacity)

| WHERE disk_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp ASC, disk_util DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC

TS metrics-kubeletstatsreceiver.otel-*

  AND k8s.node.name != ""

| EVAL disk_util = CASE(fs_cap > 0, TO_DOUBLE(fs_usage) / TO_DOUBLE(fs_cap), NULL)
| WHERE disk_util IS NOT NULL
| SORT timestamp ASC, disk_util DESC, k8s.node.name ASC, k8s.cluster.name ASC
| LIMIT 10 BY timestamp

attributes.title: [Kubernetes OTel] Nodes
